subcodes.title: Words spoken at Grand Hotel in Vienna, 1913-04-23
subcodes.first_line: The Cause of Baha'u'llah is incomparable to any other Cause, because it is the Collective Center of this age. This Cause regenerates the souls; everyone receives a new baptism and attains to the station of the new birth.
subcodes.first_line_orig: و دیگر آنکه امر حضرت بهآءاللّٰه را قیاس بامری ننمائید زیرا این امر جامع جمیع امور است
subcodes.subjects: @second birth, @spiritual transformation, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual baptism, @love as fire
